meaning: n.加麦兰(一组印尼的民族管弦乐器)
examples: In Indonesia, gamelan orchestras play music on gongs, drums, and xylophones.
They are brought up listening to the sound of the Gamelan as their lullabies.
The music is filled with allusions to Verdi, to Indonesian gamelan and to medieval plainsong.
Debussy and others tried to mimic the sound of the gamelan orchestra in their classical compositions.
The gamelan gongs, however, came from China, which in turn were brought from further west.
